title: GeoJsonResponse
description: Geolocation data returned by the /geo endpoint for a given IP address.

ip.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address that was looked up.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the IP location.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the IP location.

accuracy_radius.description: Accuracy radius in kilometers for the geolocation estimate.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier in Area/Location or Area/Location/Region format.

city.description: City name associated with the IP address.

postal_code.description: Postal or ZIP code for the IP location.

subdivisions.description: List of administrative subdivisions (e.g., states, provinces) for the IP location.

country.description: Country information for the IP location.

continent.description: Continent information for the IP location.

code.description: Two-letter continent code (e.g., OC for Oceania, EU for Europe).

is_in_european_union.description: Whether the IP location is within the European Union.

is_anonymous_proxy.description: Whether the IP address belongs to an anonymous proxy (VPN, Tor, etc.).

is_satellite_provider.description: Whether the IP address belongs to a satellite internet provider.

is_anycast.description: Whether the IP address is an anycast address.
